title: A Framework for Fine-Tuning LLMs using Heterogeneous Feedback

steps: Collecting examples of desired model behavior
Training a reward model based on binary human preference data
Refining using RLHF with PPO algorithm
method.limitations: Methods require data of a single supervision type, restricting the scope of preference data
method.recent_work: Filtering fine-tuning datasets to reduce cost and increase quality

results.contribution: Framework to use multiple fine-tuning data types
benefits: Permitting use of more fine-tuning datasets
Fine-tuning for different goals (e.g., logical reasoning and bias reduction)
Providing a more accurate view of human preference
framework_steps: Scoring samples based on quality and prompt diversity
Applying standard fine-tuning methods to a pre-trained LLM
results.key_innovation: Projecting all datasets into a unified format (binary preference)
